mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tournament_round WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND round_number = #{roundNumber} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tournament_round WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY round_number ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tournament_round (tournament_id, round_number, status, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{roundNumber}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE tournament_round SET status = 'FINISHED', finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
